# ForeSight 2026

A streamlined modern edition of the ForeSight tabletop RPG.

- Docs: https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/foresight-2026

## Documentation

Full documentation, with live code examples, is at the links below.

## Pages

- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/character-builder/ — Character Builder
  The interactive, rule-enforcing character builder — the same rules as [Creating Characters](/creating-characters/), l...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/combat/ — Combat
  Combat runs in **rounds** — brief bursts of violence separated by waiting for someone to make a move. There is no act...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/conflict/ — Conflict
  Combat, pursuit, damage, and the things that wear a character down.
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/core/ — Core Rules
  The heart of the system: how to resolve anything, and how to make a character.
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/creating-characters/ — Creating Characters
  A character is not solely described by things for which there are rules. These rules deal with *abilities* — what a c...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/damage/ — Damage
  Every attack has a **Damage Class** — how hard it hits before quality, armor, or luck. The scale is numerical and cal...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/equipment/ — Equipment
  A **basic object** is the noun: *sword*, *pistol*, *sedan*, *backpack*. A **modification** is an adjective with a def...

- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/playtest-pack/ — ForeSight — Playtest Pack
  A **score = formula + level** (see Scores). Formulas use the seven attributes **ST, EN, CO, IN, PC, WP, AP**. Each sk...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/ — ForeSight 2026
  A modern edition of the ForeSight RPG: one resolution rule (Score × Ease Factor), lethal fast combat, and a careful generative magic system.
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/introduction/ — Introduction
  ForeSight is a general-purpose role-playing game. It first appeared in 1986 as a science-fiction game system, grew a ...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/magic/ — Magic
  A careful, generative magic system — fundamentals compose into effects.
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/magic-applications/ — Magic — Applications by Fundamental
  Delay the whole or a part of the magical effect of which this application is part by up to 30s (**fixed, bestowed**).
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/open-ended-resolution/ — Open-Ended Resolution
  When two characters contest directly — a parry against an attack, stealth against a searcher, a tug-of-war, a chess m...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/power-pools/ — Power Pools
  Every power source has a **gather skill** — *Mana* for magic, *Piety* for divine power, *Spirit* for mystic disciplin...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/pursuit/ — Pursuit
  A pursuit is any contest of movement: a car chase, a dogfight, a horseback flight, a submarine running silent, a foot...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/quality-ratings/ — Quality Ratings & Yield
  A success is graded **QR1** (superb) → **QR2** → **QR3** → **QR4** (it worked, barely). Failures continue the same sc...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/reference/ — Reference
  Cheat sheets, the printable sheet, and the playtest pack.
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/scores/ — Scores
  An **attribute's** score is simply its value (Strength 11 is a score of 11).
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/skills/ — Skills
  The full skill list — the single source of truth shared with the character builder. Each skill's row links to its car...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/technology-levels/ — Technology Levels
  Technology isn't a single ladder. Read the table by **column**: each column is a thread that has its own level. For h...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/the-one-rule/ — The One Rule
  Every ability — an **attribute** (innate, like Strength or Perception) or a **skill** (trained, like Firearms or Stea...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/the-svu/ — The SVU
  Prices in ForeSight are given in **svu** (Standard Value Units), pronounced "svoo" — a coin borrowed from Jack Vance'...
- https://tonioloewald.github.io/foresight-2026/wounds-and-recovery/ — Wounds & Recovery
  Injury is a single number, **0 (healthy)** to **8 (dead)**. The level is a **−(level)** modifier to *everything* you do.
